paragraphs.opening: A genuine, personal opening paragraph written by Claude — not a JD echo. Connects your authentic interest in the company's mission or space to why you want to build there. One vivid, specific sentence beats three generic ones.
paragraphs.para2: Core experience paragraph — your most relevant role, 0-to-1 work, and customer impact. Claude connects this to the specific product domain in the JD.
paragraphs.para3: Technical and analytical depth paragraph — SQL, data-driven decisions, specific quantified outcomes (e.g. $25M incremental spend). Claude surfaces the evidence that maps to required qualifications.
paragraphs.para4: Second major achievement — cross-functional leadership, a product launch with a revenue or operational outcome.
paragraphs.para5: Reflection on collaboration, PM philosophy, and fit with the company's culture or values. Claude tailors this to the company's specific ethos (open-source, startup, enterprise, etc.).
paragraphs.closing: Closing line restating the opportunity and inviting a conversation. Company name substituted by Claude.
